calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
JPT. Cary Gold, Clerks: M. Valejo, CSR. Joe Vickstein.
Arnold Evje, II. Esq., for Plaintiff David Kaplan also present.
Defendant, Persia Stahl present in pro per.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant to remain in the premises (pay and stay) as long as she pays to the plaintiff back rent in the amount of $4,925.65, Defendant to pay the amount of $3,762.00 on July 3, 2003, and balance of $1,263.65 on July 10, 2003.
If Defendant breaches, Plaintiff is entitled to a (future) judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at:
825 Geary #1201 San Francisco, CA.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back rent and damages.
If defendant did not comply with the agreement, plaintiff may so state by ex parte declaration, with 24 hours notice to the defendant and make a motion for entry of judgment.
Plaintiff and Defendant agreed on the terms of the stipulation.
On the record the amount of $3,762.00 paid to the plaintiff as follows: $2,062.00 in cash and $1,700.00 in cashier's check #830508.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
